title: Manual JSON-RPC/MCP protocol implementation instead of SDK
evidence: src/server.rs:1-210 implements the full MCP protocol (initialize, tools/list, tools/call, notifications) manually using serde_json rather than an MCP SDK crate
suggestion: Consider using an MCP SDK if one becomes available for Rust to reduce maintenance burden and ensure protocol compliance with future spec versions

title: Comprehensive BDD test suite with 23 tests covering all capabilities
evidence: tests/bdd_tests.rs: 23 #[test] functions covering data loading, team-name normalization, date handling, match queries, team stats, head-to-head, standings, player queries, MCP protocol, and performance
suggestion: No action needed — this is a strength worth noting for cross-run comparison

title: Deduplication logic handles overlapping datasets but standings test confirms correctness
evidence: src/query.rs:123-144 dedup() and src/query.rs:413-450 standings() restrict to single source; tests/bdd_tests.rs:319-337 verifies 38-match season for leader
suggestion: Consider adding dedup coverage metrics to confirm dedup ratio across seasons
